config.query: SELECT * FROM (select first_name, last_name, email, phone_number, city, address, state, zipcode, country, pan_card, aadhar_card, donation_purpose, BOA as boa, cdate, CAST(udate AS DATETIME) as udate, original_amount, joomla_transaction_id, ereceipt_number, ereceipt_date, is_corpus, CorpusOTPPDF as corpus_link, corpus_flag, corpus_date from one_time_donation_view where ereceipt_number IS NOT NULL AND initiative_id != 3 AND udate >= '2026-04-01 00:00:00' AND ereceipt_date >= '2026-04-01 00:00:00') as t
config.timestamp.column.name: ereceipt_date
